# Penny drop on partner dashboard

: Ranjan kumar Singh
Created time: May 2, 2024 8:11 AM
Status: Not started
Last edited: February 19, 2026 7:14 PM
Owner: Lalit Bihani

# **What problem are we solving?**

- Verify partner bank account for smooth payout

---

# **How do we measure success?**

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

## User stories / User flow

As a user, when I navigate to the account details section:

- I expect to see an option to add payout details.
- If payout details are already added, I should be able to view my payout details.
- If payout details are not added, I should have the option to add them.
- I should be able to fill in all required details and submit the form.
- After adding payout details, I should be able to view them.
- If there is a failure, I should be informed of the reason for the failure.
- While filling out the details form, I should receive prompts if any of the details are invalid.
- While filling out the details form, I should receive prompts if any required details are missed.

## Requirements

## Add payout details

### Invoice details:

- No change in current behaviour of form and error handling

### Bank details:

- After user enters the bank account details and click on verify Bank, call penny drop API
- If penny drop is success show success bottom sheet.
- If penny drop fails, show enter bank account again bottom sheet
- Store all bank details in DB
    - Bank details to store:
        - Account number
        - IFSC
        - Account holder name
        - Verified : TRUE/FALSE
        - isDefault: TRUE/FALSE
        - accountAddedAt
- Penny drop rate limit handling
    - Upload cheque photo
- Backfill after bulk penny drop of already added bank details
    - Latest bank details data to collect from Nishant
- What will happen if penny drop doesn’t work?

## Edit payout details

- User should be able to edit Invoice details and add new bank account
- We need to store all bank account added by user and save added at timestamp
- Last bank account added will be considered as the default bank account

# **Appendix**

## Meeting notes

As a user, when I navigate to the account details section:

I expect to see an option to add payout details.
If payout details are already added, I should be able to view my payout details.
If payout details are not added, I should have the option to add them.
I should be able to fill in all required details and submit the form.
After adding payout details, I should be able to view them.
If there is a failure, I should be informed of the reason for the failure.
While filling out the details form, I should receive prompts if any of the details are invalid.
While filling out the details form, I should receive prompts if any required details are missed.
